sizing_rule.note: Recalculate number of contracts using Equation (3.34) whenever underlying instrument price changes. Optimal f remains constant but contract quantity must be adjusted as position sizing parameters vary with price. This is Ralph Vince's optimal f methodology requiring dynamic position quantity recalculation.

source_rule_text: The number of contracts to trade must be recalculated when the underlying instrument price changes, as optimal f, geometric mean, and TWR remain constant but position sizing parameters vary with price
